title: Metal density violation detected
description: Metal density is outside the required foundry range (min/max), impacting chemical-mechanical polishing (CMP) uniformity.
investigation_checklist: Check density report for affected layers
Identify regions with excessively high or low density
Inspect for local areas of congestion or sparse routing
Evaluate need for metal fill insertion or placement adjustments
known_causes: Area with high block-level routing congestion
Absence of metal fill/dummy metal in sparse regions
references: PDK Design Rules Manual - Metal Density Requirements
